issues.description: FlipLife action is missing the source condition. Text states 'You may add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand' — this should be conditional (may), not automatic. Should include condition checking if player chooses to perform this.

SearchDeck action has wrong destination and filter. Text states 'add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards' — destination should be 'lifeCards' not 'hand', and this action should only trigger if leader has {Straw Hat Crew} type. Condition references 'HasCardOnBoard' which is for cards on board; should use 'LeaderHasType' for leader type check.
Condition type is wrong. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with value 'Straw Hat Crew', not 'HasCardOnBoard' with a name parameter.
